title: Ancona, Marche — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ancona, Marche: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ancona is a city in Marche with a population of 100,000. The Marche region’s capital, a major Adriatic port with a beautiful historic center, a Romanesque cathedral, and stunning coastal views.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
